text.message: I think the dice are rigged so everytime someone robs another player that player instantly rolls a 7 next roll lol
My 4 wheat is a silly block
the robber sees more action than black (no offense)
Welp. Blue is gonna be a definite rob now
that one was on us, we knews he had a mono stashed away
There is the 7, right after i rob him haha
